name: Vegetarian Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in the bottom of an extra large baking pan (or use two 23 x 33 cm pans).
2. Lay one package of UNCOOKED lasagna noodles on the bottom of the pan, overlapping by 1 cm.
3. Spread half of the chopped onions, peppers, broccoli, and cauliflower over the noodles.
4. Cover the vegetables with about a third of the cottage cheese. Top the cottage cheese with about a third of the grated Mozzarella. Pour a can of tomato sauce over the Mozzarella and sprinkle with minced garlic and seasonings.
5. Repeat layers, starting again with noodles.
6. Pour the remaining tomato juice over the completed layers, ensuring the pan is no more than 1 cm from the top to avoid boiling over.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes at 180°C.
8. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving with Parmesan cheese, if desired.
